creator: ariff@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 5 Mar 2007 15:10:09 GMT
Marcin <hybridx87@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
>  Work very well -  good job :-)
>  When correct driver be available in 6-stable?
> 

Ok, here is a little test for you. Please grab
http://people.freebsd.org/~ariff/test/maestro3.c

Use kenv to set hint.pcm.0.dac="X", where X should be 1, 2, 3 or 4.
For each settings, reload snd_maestro3 module, and try playing
multiple playback streams. Please tell which settings cause the
playback starting to fail, especially the "interrupt time out channel
dead" message.


--
Ariff Abdullah
FreeBSD

... Recording in stereo is obviously too advanced
    and confusing for us idiot ***** users :P ........
